message:
feat(runtime): implement MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD transaction support

Add per-client transaction state with command queuing:
- MULTI: begin transaction, subsequent commands return +QUEUED
- EXEC: execute all queued commands atomically, return array of results
- DISCARD: abort transaction and clear queue
- Error handling: nested MULTI, EXEC/DISCARD without MULTI

TransactionState added to Runtime struct alongside existing per-client
states (auth, cluster, replication). Commands intercepted in
execute_frame() before dispatch_argv().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
